title: Client Portal
brief_text: Client needs a portal soon. It should look modern and support several workflows for their team and customers. We still need to figure out budget and platform.

title: SMB Booking Tool
brief_text: A small home services company wants a local-first scheduling tool for dispatch staff. Goals: reduce missed appointments and keep job notes in one place. Budget under $15k.

title: Client B2B Analytics
brief_text: A B2B analytics product for account managers should highlight churn risk and renewal blockers. We know the audience and goals, but the commercial model is still open and the first platform is undecided.

title: Client Renewal Assistant
brief_text: We need a renewal planning assistant for account managers. Primary goal is to reduce renewal prep time. This should work for existing teams and maybe customers later. Budget is approved, but success is still not defined concretely.

title: Client Finance Assistant
brief_text: We need a finance workflow assistant for handling customer financial records and approvals. It should be ready quickly for a small team, but the controls for sensitive data are not documented.
